text:
- Update to 0.3
	* general core rewrite
	* new screen - clock
	* support for asian wide characters
	* support for non-utf8 encodings
	* a lot of bugfixes
- Add CLOCK and UTF8 Options
- Tested ( http://tb.4bit.ws/index.php?action=describe_port&id=3 )
